Start with the VPC and use cidrsubnet() to dynamically compute subnet CIDRs. Use a data source for aws_availability_zones instead of hardcoding AZ names.
Create public subnets with map_public_ip_on_launch=true and an Internet Gateway. Private subnets need a NAT Gateway (placed in a public subnet) for outbound internet access.
For security groups, use the principle of least privilege. The database SG should reference the app SG ID (not a CIDR block) to only allow traffic from application instances.
Use variables for all configurable values, locals for computed values, and outputs for resource IDs that other configurations might need. Tag all resources consistently.
